title: Sanitizers, Static Analysis, and Fuzzing · C Contract Brief: Ubsan Msan Evidence
summary: A security parser needs fast local feedback, nightly deep instrumentation, adversarial generation, and reproducible findings. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem ubsan msan evidence increment in layered memory-defect test matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer and fully instrumented MemorySanitizer environments for their distinct defect classes.
Build and run representative tests with AddressSanitizer and LeakSanitizer, symbols, fatal findings, and supported-target notes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
